data.title: Scalable Infrastructure
data.description: Google.com uses a highly distributed infrastructure to handle massive traffic loads efficiently.
data.technical_spec: Distributed servers, load balancing, HTTP/2, and CDN integration.

data.title: Microservices Architecture
data.description: Adopts microservices for easier management and deployment.

data.title: Redundancy and Failover Systems
data.description: Ensures availability and reliability through automated failover protocols.
data.technical_spec: Global data replication and redundancy mechanisms.

data.title: Data Centers
data.description: Utilizes state-of-the-art global data centers for optimized performance.
data.technical_spec: Advanced cooling systems, high-density server racks, and modular layouts.

data.title: AI-Powered Search Algorithms
data.description: Employs AI and ML for optimizing search relevance and speed.
